            apply (le_div_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_mem_primesBelow hp.1)).mpr
            linarith
          linarith))
      _ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
        have h1 : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· > n / L), (n / p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) ≤
            n * ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· > n / L), Real.log (n / p) / p := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro p hp
          simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hp
          have h2 : (n / p : ℝ) ≤ n / p := by rfl
          have h3 : Real.log (n / p) ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg (by
            have h4 : (p : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_mem_primesBelow hp.1)
            have h5 : (n / p : ℝ) ≥ 1 := by
              apply (le_div_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_mem_primesBelow hp.1)).mpr
              linarith
            linarith)
          calc (n / p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) ≤ (n / p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) := by rfl
            _ ≤ n * (Real.log (n / p) / p) := by
              field_simp
              ring_nf
              nlinarith
        have h2 : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· > n / L), Real.log (n / p) / p ≤ ε / 3 := by
          have h3 : (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· > n / L) ⊆ (n + 1).primesBelow := Finset.filter_subset _ _
          have h4 : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, Real.log (n / p) / p ≤ ε / 3 := by
            sorry
          calc ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· > n / L), Real.log (n / p) / p ≤
              ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, Real.log (n / p) / p := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg h3
                (by intro p _ _; positivity)
            _ ≤ ε / 3 := h4
        calc _ ≤ n * (ε / 3) := by gcongr
          _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
  have hmedium_small_primes : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· ≤ n / L),
      (if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
       else if p ≤ L then (-(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)) * Real.log L
       else (-(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)) * Real.log (n / p)) ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
    apply Filter.eventually_atTop.mpr
    use L * L + 1
    intro n hn
    have hn_large : n > L * L := by linarith
    calc ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· ≤ n / L),
        (if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
         else if p ≤ L then (-(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)) * Real.log L
         else (-(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)) * Real.log (n / p))
      _ ≤ ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· ≤ n / L),
        (P.M * Real.log n) * Real.log n := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro p hp
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hp
        have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M * Real.log n := by
          rcases le_total p (Real.sqrt n) with h2 | h2
          · exact Params.initial.balance_small_prime_le ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn_large⟩ h2
          · exact Params.initial.balance_medium_prime_le ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn_large⟩ h2
        have h2 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log n - P.M * L^2 * primeCounting n := by
          rcases le_total p L with h3 | h3
          · exact Params.initial.balance_tiny_prime_ge ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn_large⟩ h3
          · have h4 : p > Real.sqrt n := by
              have h5 : (L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt n := by
                rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg n)]
                exact_mod_cast by nlinarith
              have h6 : (p : ℝ) > L := by exact_mod_cast h3
              nlinarith
            exact Params.initial.balance_medium_prime_ge ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn_large⟩ (by linarith) h4
        split_ifs <;> try
          { nlinarith }
      _ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
        have h1 : (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· ≤ n / L).card ≤ n := by
          calc (n + 1).primesBelow.filter (· ≤ n / L).card ≤ (n + 1).primesBelow.card := Finset.card_filter_le
            _ ≤ n := by
              have h2 : (n + 1).primesBelow.card ≤ n := by
                apply Finset.card_le_of_injective (fun p _ => p) (fun p q _ _ h => h)
                intro p hp
                exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.prime_one_lt (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)) (le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_mem_primesBelow hp))
              exact h2
        calc _ ≤ n * (P.M * Real.log n * Real.log n) := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul
          intro p hp
          simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hp
          positivity
        _ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
          have h2 : P.M * Real.log n * Real.log n ≤ ε / 3 := by
            sorry
          calc _ ≤ n * (ε / 3) := by gcongr
            _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
  have hpenalty : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, (if P.initial.total_imbalance > 0 then Real.log n else 0) ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
    apply Filter.eventually_atTop.mpr
    use max (L * L + 1) 2
    intro n hn
    have hn_pos : n ≥ 2 := by
      have h1 : n ≥ max (L * L + 1) 2 := by linarith
      exact Nat.le_max_right _ _ |>.trans h1
    have hlog : Real.log n ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
      have h1 : Real.log n / n ≤ ε / 3 := by
        sorry
      calc Real.log n = (Real.log n / n) * n := by field_simp
        _ ≤ (ε / 3) * n := by gcongr
        _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
    split_ifs <;> linarith
  have hfinal : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, ∃ P : Params, P.n = n ∧ P.initial.score P.L ≤ ε * n := by
    filter_upwards [hL_sq, hwaste, hlarge_primes, hmedium_small_primes, hpenalty] with n hn hn_waste hn_large hn_medium hn_penalty
    use ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩
    simp only [Factorization.score, hn_waste, hn_large, hn_medium, hn_penalty]
    linarith
  exact hfinal

have hM : ∃ M : ℕ, M > 0 ∧ 1 / M < ε / 3 := by
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := exists_nat_one_div_lt hε
    exact ⟨M, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by simp_all, by linarith⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_bound⟩ := hM
  let L := M * M
  have hL_pos : L > 0 := by nlinarith
  have h_log_n : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, Real.log n < ε * n / 3 := by
    apply eventually_of_forall
    intro n
    have : Real.log n < ε * n / 3 := by
      have := Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < n)
      nlinarith [hε]
    exact this
  have h_prime_count : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, (primeCounting n : ℝ) < ε * n / (3 * M * L * L) := by
    apply eventually_of_forall
    intro n
    have := primeCounting_pos n
    nlinarith [hε, hM_pos, hL_pos]
  have h_waste : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ < ε * n / 3 := by
    apply eventually_of_forall
    intro n
    have : Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ < ε / 3 := by
      rw [Real.log_inv]
      nlinarith [hM_bound]
    nlinarith
  filter_upwards [h_log_n, h_prime_count, h_waste] with n hn_log hn_prime hn_waste
  use { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := by nlinarith }
  constructor
  · rfl
  · calc
      (initial _).score L
        = (initial _).waste
          + (if (initial _).total_imbalance > 0 then Real.log n else 0)
          + ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
            if (initial _).balance p > 0 then ((initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
            else if p ≤ L then (-(initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
            else (-(initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) := rfl
        ≤ (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹
          + Real.log n
          + ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
            if (initial _).balance p > 0 then ((initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
            else if p ≤ L then (-(initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
            else (-(initial _).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) := by
            split_ifs <;> nlinarith [hn_waste]
        ≤ ε * n / 3 + ε * n / 3 + ε * n / 3 := by
            nlinarith [hn_log, hn_prime]
        _ = ε * n := by ring

have hM : ∃ M : ℕ, M > 0 ∧ (1 : ℝ) / M < ε / 3 := by
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := exists_nat_one_div_lt (by positivity)
    exact ⟨M, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp_all), hM⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_bound⟩ := hM
  let L := M * M
  have hL_pos : L > 0 := by nlinarith
  have hL_sq : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, n > L * L := by
    apply Filter.eventually_gt_atTop
  have hwaste : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
    have hlog : Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ < ε / 3 := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) / M < ε / 3 := hM_bound
      have : 1 - 1 / M > 0 := by
        have : (1 : ℝ) / M ≤ 1 := by exact div_le_one_of_le (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
        linarith
      calc
        Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ = -Real.log (1 - 1 / M) := by rw [Real.log_inv]
        _ < ε / 3 := by
          have : -Real.log (1 - 1 / M) < ε / 3 := by
            have : Real.log (1 - 1 / M) > -ε / 3 := by
              apply Real.log_gt_sub_one_of_pos
              linarith
              linarith
            linarith
          exact this
    filter_upwards with n hn
    have : (n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
    nlinarith
  have hlarge_primes : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop,
      ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, if p > n / L then
        max 0 (-P.initial.balance p) * Real.log (n / p) else 0 ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
    sorry
  have hsmall_primes : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop,
      ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, if p ≤ L then
        max 0 (-P.initial.balance p) * Real.log L else 0 ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
    sorry
  filter_upwards with n hn using hL_sq, hwaste, hlarge_primes, hsmall_primes
  use { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn }
  simp only [Factorization.score, Nat.cast_id]
  have htotal_imbalance : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn }).total_imbalance ≥ 0 := by
    exact Nat.zero_le _
  split_ifs <;> nlinarith

have h1 : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, ∃ M L : ℕ, M > 0 ∧ L > 0 ∧ n > L * L ∧
      (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ + (M : ℝ) * Real.log n +
      (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) ≤ ε * n := by
    apply Filter.eventually_atTop.mpr
    use ⌈4 / ε⌉₊
    intro n hn
    set M := ⌈4 / ε⌉₊ with hM_def
    have hM_pos : M > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by simp_all [Nat.ceil_eq_zero]
    set L := M^2 with hL_def
    have hL_pos : L > 0 := pow_pos hM_pos 2
    have hn_large : n > L * L := by
      calc
        n ≥ ⌈4 / ε⌉₊ ^ 4 := hn
        _ = (M^2)^2 := by rw [hM_def, hL_def]
        _ = L * L := by rw [hL_def]; ring
        _ > L * L - 1 := by linarith
      omega
    have hlog_term : (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
      have hM_ge : (M : ℝ) ≥ 4 / ε := Nat.le_ceil _
      have hM_inv : (1 : ℝ) / M ≤ ε / 4 := by
        rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
      have hlog_bound : Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ ≤ ε / 3 := by
        have h1M_lt1 : (1 : ℝ) / M < 1 := by
          rw [div_lt_one] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
        calc
          Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ = -Real.log (1 - 1 / M) := by rw [Real.log_inv]
          _ ≤ -Real.log (1 - ε / 4) := by gcongr
          _ ≤ ε / 3 := by
            have : 0 < ε / 4 := by linarith
            have : ε / 4 < 1 := by linarith
            nlinarith [Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith : 0 < 1 - ε / 4)]
      calc
        (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ ≤ n * (ε / 3) := by gcongr
        _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
    have hM_log_term : (M : ℝ) * Real.log n ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
      have : (Real.log n) / n ≤ ε / (3 * M) := by
        apply (div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr
        have : Real.log n ≤ ε * n / (3 * M) := by
          have : n ≥ exp (ε * n / (3 * M)) := by
            apply le_of_not_gt
            intro h
            have : Real.log n < ε * n / (3 * M) := Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity) |>.trans h
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      calc
        (M : ℝ) * Real.log n = n * ((M : ℝ) * Real.log n / n) := by field_simp
        _ ≤ n * (ε / 3) := by gcongr
        _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
    have hprime_term : (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
      have : primeCounting n ≤ 2 * n / Real.log n := by
        apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
        apply lt_of_sub_pos
        have := PrimeNumberTheorem.tendsto_primeCounting_div (n : ℝ)
        have := Filter.Tendsto.eventually this (by positivity)
        exact_mod_cast this
      calc
        (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) ≤ (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (2 * n / Real.log n) := by gcongr
        _ = 2 * M * L^2 * n / Real.log n := by ring
        _ ≤ ε * n / 3 := by
          have : 2 * M * L^2 / Real.log n ≤ ε / 3 := by
            have : Real.log n ≥ 6 * M * L^2 / ε := by
              apply le_of_not_gt
              intro h
              have : n < exp (6 * M * L^2 / ε) := Real.lt_exp_log (by positivity) |>.trans h
              linarith
            calc
              2 * M * L^2 / Real.log n ≤ 2 * M * L^2 / (6 * M * L^2 / ε) := by gcongr
              _ = ε / 3 := by field_simp
          calc
            2 * M * L^2 * n / Real.log n = n * (2 * M * L^2 / Real.log n) := by ring
            _ ≤ n * (ε / 3) := by gcongr
            _ = ε * n / 3 := by ring
    calc
      (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ + (M : ℝ) * Real.log n +
        (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) ≤ ε * n / 3 + ε * n / 3 + ε * n / 3 := by
        linarith
      _ = ε * n := by ring
    exact ⟨M, L, hM_pos, hL_pos, hn_large, this⟩
  refine Filter.eventually_mp h1 fun n ⟨M, L, hM_pos, hL_pos, hn_L, hbound⟩ ↦
    ⟨{ n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }, rfl,
      calc
        (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).score L
          ≤ (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).waste +
            (if (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).total_imbalance > 0 then Real.log n else 0) +
            ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
              if (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p > 0 then
                ((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
              else if p ≤ L then
                -((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
              else
                -((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) := by
            rfl
        _ ≤ (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ +
            (M : ℝ) * Real.log n +
            (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
          have hwaste : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).waste ≤
              (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ := by
            exact initial.waste { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }
          have himbalance : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).total_imbalance ≤
              M * (primeCounting n) := by
            have : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).total_imbalance =
                ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, ((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p).natAbs := rfl
            calc
              _ ≤ ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, M := by
                apply Finset.sum_le_sum
                intro p hp
                have hprime : p.Prime := prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp
                rcases lt_or_le p (Real.sqrt n) with hps | hps
                · have : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M * (Real.log n) := by
                    exact balance_small_prime_le { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hps
                  have : -(initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M * (Real.log n) := by
                    have : p ≤ n := le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_mem_primesBelow hp)
                    exact balance_tiny_prime_ge { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } (le_trans (by norm_num) hps)
                  exact Nat.natAbs_le.mpr (by linarith)
                · rcases lt_or_le p (n / L) with hpm | hpm
                  · have : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M := by
                      exact balance_medium_prime_le { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hps
                    have : -(initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M := by
                      exact balance_medium_prime_ge { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpm hps
                    exact Nat.natAbs_le.mpr (by linarith)
                  · have : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ 0 := by
                      exact balance_large_prime_le { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpm
                    have : -(initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ n / p := by
                      exact balance_large_prime_ge { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpm
                    exact Nat.natAbs_le.mpr (by linarith)
              _ = M * (primeCounting n) := by
                simp [primeCounting, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          have hlog_term : (if (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).total_imbalance > 0 then Real.log n else 0) ≤ (M : ℝ) * Real.log n := by
            split_ifs <;> linarith
          have hsum_term : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
              if (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p > 0 then
                ((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
              else if p ≤ L then
                -((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
              else
                -((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) ≤
              (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro p hp
            have hprime : p.Prime := prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp
            rcases lt_or_le p (Real.sqrt n) with hps | hps
            · rcases lt_or_le p L with hpt | hpt
              · have : -(initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M * (Real.log n) + M * L^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
                  exact balance_tiny_prime_ge { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpt
                calc
                  -((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L ≤
                    (M * (Real.log n) + M * L^2 * (primeCounting n)) * Real.log L := by gcongr
                  _ ≤ M * L^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
                    have : Real.log L ≤ 1 := by
                      have : L ≥ 1 := by linarith
                      have : Real.log L ≤ Real.log (exp 1) := Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by linarith)
                      simp at this
                      linarith
                    nlinarith
              · have : (initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ M * (Real.log n) := by
                  exact balance_small_prime_le { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hps
                calc
                  ((initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p ≤
                    (M * (Real.log n)) * Real.log p := by gcongr
                  _ ≤ M * L^2 * (primeCounting n) := by

                    have : Real.log n ≤ L^2 * (primeCounting n) := by

                        apply Nat.succ_le_iff.mp
                        apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero
                        intro h
                        have : n < 2 := by
                          have := primeCounting_zero

                    nlinarith

                  exact balance_large_prime_le { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpm
                have : -(initial { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L }).balance p ≤ n / p := by
                  exact balance_large_prime_ge { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hn_L } hpm

    linarith

  exact hscore.mono fun n hn => ⟨⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, by nlinarith⟩, rfl, hn⟩

have h1 : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, n > 0 := by
    exact Filter.eventually_gt_atTop 0
  have h2 : ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, ∃ M : ℕ, M > 0 ∧ (1 : ℝ) / M < ε / 4 := by

    refine Filter.eventually_and h2 h3 |>.mp ?_
    apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
    rintro n ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_bound⟩ ⟨L, hL_pos, hL_sq⟩
    use M, M * M
    constructor
    · exact hM_pos
    · constructor
      · exact mul_pos hM_pos hM_pos
      · constructor
        · nlinarith [hL_sq]
        · constructor
          · exact hM_bound
          · rfl

    apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
    rintro n hn_pos ⟨M, L, hM_pos, hL_pos, hL_sq, hM_bound, hL_eq⟩
    use { n := n, M := M, L := L, hL_pos := hL_pos, hL := hL_sq }
    rfl

      P.n = n ∧ P.initial.waste ≤ P.n * log (1 - 1/P.M)⁻¹ ∧

    -- This combines the waste bound and the balance sum bound using the prime number theorem
    -- and the earlier lemmas about balance for large, medium, small, and tiny primes.
    -- The details are technical but standard in analytic number theory.
    -- We assume these bounds hold eventually for the chosen parameters.
    sorry

  apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
  rintro n ⟨P, hP_n, hP_waste, hP_sum, hP_penalty⟩

      P.initial.score P.L

have hM : ∃ M : ℕ, M > 0 ∧ (1 : ℝ) / M < ε / 4 := by
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := exists_nat_one_div_lt (by positivity)
    exact ⟨M, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp_all), by simpa using hM⟩

    have h_log : Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ < ε / 4 := by

    intro n _
    nlinarith

    sorry

      exact_mod_cast this

        have : (1 - 1 / ↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ) ≥ 1 - ε / 4 := by
          rw [ge_iff_le]
          have : (1 / ↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ) ≤ ε / 4 := by
            rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
          linarith
        have : Real.log (1 - 1 / ↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊)⁻¹ = -Real.log (1 - 1 / ↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊) := by
          simp [Real.log_inv]
        rw [this]
        have : -Real.log (1 - 1 / ↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊) ≤ ε / 4 := by

            · linarith

                    _ = 1 / ε := by field_simp
                    _ ≤ ε / 4 := by
                      rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
                linarith
            linarith
          have : (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ)^3 * n ≤ ε * n / 4 := by
            have : (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ)^3 ≤ ε / 4 := by
              have : (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ) ≤ 4 / ε := by
                exact_mod_cast Nat.ceil_le (by positivity) (by linarith)
              calc
                (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ)^3 ≤ (4 / ε)^3 := by gcongr
                _ = 64 / ε^3 := by ring
                _ ≤ ε / 4 := by
                  rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_num <;> nlinarith
            calc
              (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ)^3 * n ≤ (ε / 4) * n := by gcongr
              _ = ε * n / 4 := by ring
          calc
            n * (ε / 4) + (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ) * Real.log n + (↑⌈4 / ε⌉₊ : ℝ)^3 * n ≤
              n * (ε / 4) + ε * n / 4 + ε * n / 4 := by gcongr
            _ = 3 * ε * n / 4 := by ring
            _ ≤ ε * n := by linarith
  filter_upwards [h1] with n h
  obtain ⟨M, L, hM_pos, hL_pos, hn_gt, h_score⟩ := h
  use ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn_gt⟩
  simp_all

    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := exists_nat_one_div_lt hε
    exact ⟨M, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by simp_all, by linarith⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_bound⟩ := hM

      (if (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.total_imbalance > 0) then Real.log n else 0) +
      ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
        if (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p > 0) then
          (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
        else if p ≤ L then
          -(⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
        else
          -(⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) := by
    rfl
  have htotal : (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.total_imbalance > 0) →
      Real.log n ≤ (M : ℝ) * Real.log n := by
    intro h
    exact_mod_cast Nat.succ_le_of_lt hM_pos |>.cast
  have hsum : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
      if (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p > 0) then
        (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
      else if p ≤ L then
        -(⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
      else
        -(⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) ≤
      (M : ℝ) * Real.log n + (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
    sorry
  calc
    (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.score L)
      ≤ (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ +
          (if (⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩.initial.total_imbalance > 0) then Real.log n else 0) +
          ((M : ℝ) * Real.log n + (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n)) := by
        linarith [hscore, hsum]
      ≤ (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ + (M : ℝ) * Real.log n +
          (M : ℝ) * (L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting n) := by
        split_ifs <;> linarith [htotal ‹_›]
      ≤ ε * n := hbound
